title: adenoderris viscidula
intro: Adenoderris viscidula, also known as Adenoderris viscidula or Chinese goldenseal, is a plant species native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat infections and wounds due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Adenoderris viscidula include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Adenoderris viscidula is often used in combination with other herbs, and can be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas.
